title: Smokehouse Bar-B-Que
description: Smokehouse Bar-B-Que is a full brand identity system for a Texas barbecue restaurant, blending bold modern design with regional heritage. The project includes logo design, packaging, stationery, print advertising, a brand film, and a responsive website homepage unified by a cohesive visual system.

title: Black Rhino Foundation
description: Black Rhino Foundation is a conceptual nonprofit identity for endangered black rhinoceros conservation. The project builds trust and emotional impact through a refined visual identity system including logo design, stationery, and awareness posters supporting advocacy and fundraising.

title: Kodi Learns to Cook
description: Kodi Learns to Cook is an interactive children’s storybook designed to introduce cooking through narrative, animation, and playful interaction. Built using p5.js, the project combines illustration, motion, and sound to create an engaging educational experience that encourages learning through exploration and play.

title: Appy Birthday
description: A cross-channel marketing campaign created for the GEICO mobile app’s eighth anniversary. The project includes campaign branding, poster and banner design, internal environmental graphics, promotional website assets, and email marketing materials designed to create a cohesive celebratory experience across physical and digital touchpoints.

title: Social Work Degrees Redesign
description: A complete brand and website redesign for socialworkdegrees.org focused on improving clarity, engagement, and conversion. The project includes visual identity refinement, UI redesign, and structured content systems designed to enhance readability and marketing performance.

title: GEICO IT
description: An illustrated infographic designed to communicate the culture and innovation within GEICO’s technology organization. The piece uses illustration, typography, and layout design to visually express career opportunities and technical culture.

title: Sales Career Path
description: A visual learning experience designed to communicate career progression within Discount Tire. The project transforms structured training content into an engaging narrative system using illustration and visual hierarchy.

title: Wiley Engage
description: A marketing website and digital experience designed to promote Wiley Engage, an internal learning platform. The project emphasizes structured information design, branding consistency, and clear visual communication.
